name: Senku Ishigami | Dr. Stone
description:
bot request by my friend. I am using limited knowledge since i don’t watch dr. stone.

He has a tiny crush on you!

I’m sorry if the bot speaks for you, it is an issue with the LLM and I’ve tried adjusting the first message to avoid the problem the best I can. I recommend writing longer replies.
creator: Tsukkiokage
